}; // ── Data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const GOALS = [ { id: “muscle”, title: “Muscle Gain”, tagline: “Build lean, eat heavy”, icon: Dumbbell, proteinRange: “35–45g”, description: “Engineered for hypertrophy. Whey, paneer, eggs, lean cuts. Surplus calories with high protein per kg of bodyweight.”, sample: [“Grilled Chicken + Brown Rice”, “Paneer Tikka + Quinoa”, “Egg Bhurji + Multigrain Toast”], }, { id: “fatloss”, title: “Fat Loss”, tagline: “Cut without crashing”, icon: Flame, proteinRange: “25–35g”, description: “Volume eating, low calorie density. Fiber-loaded so you stay full at a deficit. Sustainable, not extreme.”, sample: [“Moong Chilla + Curd”, “Soy Chunk Curry + 2 Roti”, “Chicken Clear Soup + Salad”], }, { id: “office”, title: “Office Plan”, tagline: “Steady fuel, no slumps”, icon: Briefcase, proteinRange: “28–38g”, description: “Balanced macros for the workday. Complex carbs, moderate fats, no afternoon crash. Desk-friendly portions.”, sample: [“Oats Power Bowl”, “Rajma + Brown Rice”, “Grilled Fish + Veggies”], }, { id: “pcos”, title: “PCOS-Friendly”, tagline: “Hormone-balanced, low GI”, icon: Heart, proteinRange: “25–35g”, description: “Low GI, anti-inflammatory ingredients. No refined sugar, dairy moderated, seed-cycling friendly.”, sample: [“Veg Omelette + Avocado”, “Quinoa Pulao + Paneer”, “Tofu Stir Fry + Roti”], }, ]; const PLANS = [ { id: “trial”, name: “3-Day Trial”, duration: “3 Days”, meals: “3 meals”, mealCount: 3, veg: 849, nonveg: 999, popular: false, perks: [“1 meal per day”, “Full menu access”, “No commitment”], }, { id: “weekly”, name: “Weekly”, duration: “7 Days”, meals: “6 meals”, mealCount: 6, veg: 2049, nonveg: 2400, popular: true, perks: [“Stay consistent”, “Skip Sundays”, “Priority support”], }, { id: “monthly”, name: “Monthly”, duration: “30 Days”, meals: “24 meals”, mealCount: 24, veg: 7649, nonveg: 9000, popular: false, perks: [“Real transformation”, “Best per-meal value”, “Free menu rotation”], }, ]; const MEAL_TYPES = [ { id: “lunch”, label: “Lunch only” }, { id: “dinner”, label: “Dinner only” }, { id: “both”, label: “Lunch + Dinner” }, ]; const FULL_MENU = { Breakfast: [ { name: “Oats Power Bowl”, desc: “Oats, whey, nuts, seeds, banana”, cal: 412, prot: 24 }, { name: “Paneer Bhurji”, desc: “Paneer, capsicum, masala, multigrain toast”, cal: 395, prot: 28 }, { name: “Moong Chilla”, desc: “Moong dal chilla, mint chutney, curd”, cal: 360, prot: 23 }, { name: “Veg Omelette”, desc: “3 egg whites, veggies, brown bread”, cal: 310, prot: 24 }, ], Lunch: [ { name: “Butter Chicken”, desc: “Chicken, light gravy, brown rice, veggies”, cal: 560, prot: 38 }, { name: “Grilled Chicken”, desc: “Herb grilled chicken, brown rice, veggies”, cal: 480, prot: 42 }, { name: “Paneer Tikka”, desc: “Paneer tikka, quinoa pulao, veggies”, cal: 470, prot: 28 }, { name: “Rajma & Rice”, desc: “Rajma, brown rice, salad”, cal: 520, prot: 24 }, { name: “Soy Chunk Curry”, desc: “Soy chunks, 2 roti, salad”, cal: 460, prot: 28 }, ], Dinner: [ { name: “Grilled Fish”, desc: “Fish, stir fry veggies, lemon butter”, cal: 390, prot: 34 }, { name: “Egg Curry”, desc: “Eggs in light gravy, 1 roti, salad”, cal: 420, prot: 27 }, { name: “Soup & Protein”, desc: “Chicken clear soup, grilled chicken”, cal: 350, prot: 30 }, { name: “Tofu Stir Fry”, desc: “Tofu, mixed veggies, 1 roti”, cal: 380, prot: 26 }, ], }; // ── BMI helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const calcBMI = (h, w) => { const hM = parseFloat(h) / 100; const kg = parseFloat(w); if (!hM || !kg) return null; return +(kg / (hM * hM)).toFixed(1); }; const bmiCategory = (bmi) => { if (!bmi) return null; if (bmi < 18.5) return { label: “Underweight”, color: T.warm }; if (bmi < 25) return { label: “Normal”, color: T.accent }; if (bmi < 30) return { label: “Overweight”, color: T.gold }; return { label: “Obese”, color: T.warm }; }; // ── Reusable: Logo ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const Logo = ({ size = 1, light = false }) => (
Fit 2 Eat
); // ── Top Nav with hamburger ───────────────────────────────────────────────── const TopNav = ({ go, openMenu }) => (
{/* Left: hamburger */} ``` {/* Center: logo */} {/* Right: contact */} +91 {CONTACT} Call
```
); // ── Slide-in Hamburger Menu ──────────────────────────────────────────────── const SideMenu = ({ open, onClose, go }) => ( {open && ( <>
```
{[ { label: "Home", page: "home", icon: HomeIcon }, { label: "Our Menu", page: "menu", icon: Leaf }, { label: "Choose Goal", page: "goal", icon: Sparkles }, { label: "Plans & Pricing", page: "plan", icon: CreditCard }, { label: "Contact", page: "contact", icon: Phone }, ].map((item, i) => ( { go(item.page); onClose(); }} className="group flex items-center justify-between py-5 border-b transition-all hover:pl-2" style={{ borderColor: T.line }} >
{item.label}
))}

Get in touch

+91 {CONTACT} WhatsApp us
)} ``` ); // ── Step indicator ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const StepIndicator = ({ step, total, labels }) => (
Step {step} of {total} {labels[step - 1]}
); // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // PAGE 1 — HOME // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ const HomePage = ({ go }) => { // Rotating hero carousel const HERO_SLIDES = [IMG.gyro, IMG.cobb, IMG.platter, IMG.greek, IMG.grid4, IMG.caesar]; const [slide, setSlide] = useState(0); const [paused, setPaused] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { if (paused) return; const t = setInterval(() => { setSlide((s) => (s + 1) % HERO_SLIDES.length); }, 5000); return () => clearInterval(t); }, [paused, HERO_SLIDES.length]); return (
{/* FULLSCREEN ROTATING HERO */}
setPaused(true)} onMouseLeave={() => setPaused(false)} > {/* Background slides */} ``` {/* Dark gradient overlay for text legibility */}

── Garden first ──
Vegetables sourced each morning
── Our philosophy ──

Food should{" "} work for you,
not against you.

Every meal is portioned, weighed, and built around your daily macro target. No oil-heavy gravies. No filler carbs. No compromise on taste.

{/* Wide cinematic banner */}
── Cooked today, eaten today ──

Zero cold storage.
Zero shortcuts.

Every meal cooked the same morning it's delivered. The fresh window matters more than any marketing claim.

{/* CTA band */}
── Ready when you are ──

Eat clean.
Stay sharp.

Start with a 3-day trial. ₹849 veg, ₹999 non-veg. No commitment, no hidden fees.

``` ); }; // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // PAGE 3 — BMI // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ const BMIPage = ({ go, state, setState }) => { const [height, setHeight] = useState(state.height || “”); const [weight, setWeight] = useState(state.weight || “”); const [age, setAge] = useState(state.age || “”); const [gender, setGender] = useState(state.gender || “”); const [activity, setActivity] = useState(state.activity || “moderate”); const bmi = useMemo(() => calcBMI(height, weight), [height, weight]); const cat = bmiCategory(bmi); const tdee = useMemo(() => { const w = parseFloat(weight); const h = parseFloat(height); const a = parseFloat(age); if (!w || !h || !a || !gender) return null; let bmr = gender === “male” ? 10 * w + 6.25 * h - 5 * a + 5 : 10 * w + 6.25 * h - 5 * a - 161; const mult = { sedentary: 1.2, light: 1.375, moderate: 1.55, active: 1.725 }[activity]; return Math.round(bmr * mult); }, [height, weight, age, gender, activity]); const goalAdjusted = useMemo(() => { if (!tdee) return null; const adj = { muscle: 1.12, fatloss: 0.82, office: 1.0, pcos: 0.92 }[state.goal] || 1; return Math.round(tdee * adj); }, [tdee, state.goal]); const ready = height && weight && age && gender; return (
```

We use this to calculate your daily calorie target. Numbers, not guesses.
